chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 179 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (Priority) 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of CMA No.756/2024 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 08.09.2025 Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional Advocate General Sindh Mr. Shafi Muhammad Mahar, DPG for the State >>>>>..<<<<< On 01.09.2025 the following order was passed;- “Learned counsel submits that the petitioners are not in contact with him. Even otherwise, none was present on the last date of hearing. Under these circumstances, the petition is liable to be dismissed; however, in the interest of justice and as a last chance, the matter is adjourned to 08.09.2025.” Today, none present for the petitioners nor any intimation received. The instant Constitutional petition is pending without any useful progress. The absence on the part of the petitioners and their Counsel prima facie suggests that either the purpose of filing instant Petition has been served or they have lost interest in pursuing the same. Accordingly, the Petition is dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed application. Judge Judge ARBROHI
